title: Social Media Calendar System
title_cn: 社交媒体内容管理系统
description: Create a social media content calendar with NocoBase no-code platform for writing, scheduling, and publishing.
description_cn: 用开源无代码平台 NocoBase 生成社交媒体内容管理系统，管理帖子撰写和排程发布。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Social Media Calendar System: a post composer with a live phone preview and a scheduling calendar. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/04-social-media-calendar.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 社媒日历:帖子编辑器 + 手机实时预览和排期日历。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/04-social-media-calendar.html
